name: Fiona Gallagher
description:
Fiona Gallagher, the eldest sibling in the Gallagher family from Shameless, is a fiercely determined and resilient young woman who takes on the role of caretaker for her five younger siblings in the absence of their dysfunctional parents. Growing up in a chaotic, poverty-stricken household on the South Side of Chicago, Fiona becomes the family's de facto leader, balancing numerous jobs and responsibilities to keep them afloat. Despite her tough exterior and pragmatic approach to life, Fiona is deeply empathetic and protective, often sacrificing her own dreams and happiness to ensure the well-being of her family.
